_README: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the WCM site. Edit values here; the Astro pages read from this file.

services.title: Food Processing & USDA Conversions
services.body: Ground-up industrial facilities and conversions of existing stock into USDA-grade production-built around washdown, sanitation, refrigeration, utilities, and inspection-driven construction.

services.title: Senior Living & Assisted Living
services.body: Ground-up senior and assisted living on wood-frame schedules, with HUD process familiarity and a closeout cadence that keeps speed from costing you quality.

services.title: Commercial Construction Management
services.body: For owners and developers tired of self-managing capital projects. Preconstruction, budget and schedule oversight, contractor coordination, and risk management-one accountable partner.

process.title: Feasibility & Budget Lock
process.body: Zoning check, concept design, ROM budget, milestone schedule, and a risk register-before you overcommit to a property purchase, design, or equipment.

process.title: Design Management
process.body: We keep architects and engineers aligned to your cost and speed targets, so the design matches your capital reality-not the other way around.

process.title: Trade & Schedule Buyout
process.body: Bid leveling, scope-gap closure, and a procurement command center. We buy out the schedule as hard as we buy out cost.

process.title: Active-Plant Build Execution
process.body: Construction planned around live production-phasing, partitions, off-hours work, dust and contamination control, and weekly cost-to-complete.

process.title: Owner Communication
process.body: Our in-house owner dashboard allows our clients to see in real time exactly where their project stands on schedule, cost, and design. No more waiting for vague weekly updates.

process.title: Closeout & Accountability
process.body: Punch velocity, commissioning coordination, warranties, O&M, and a clean closeout package that protects startup and inspection.

insights.title: The Food Facility Expansion Risk Audit
insights.body: Utility, AHJ, inspection, phasing, and budget risks-exposed before they delay production or blow up the project.

insights.title: Owner's Guide to Budget Certainty
insights.body: How early preconstruction and risk discovery keep the number you approved close to the number you actually pay.

insights.title: USDA Conversion Checklist
insights.body: Before you convert an industrial building, know whether it can actually support food processing-and what it will cost.

projects.name: Seaboard Triumph Foods
projects.summary: A greenfield 700,000 SF pork processing plant-one of the largest USDA-grade facilities of its kind-built to full sanitary, refrigeration, and inspection standards while hitting an aggressive commissioning date.
projects.challenges: Massive utility and refrigeration loads, USDA sanitary construction throughout, long-lead equipment coordination across dozens of vendors, and a fixed commissioning window tied to production commitments.
projects.role: Design management, trade and schedule buyout, equipment coordination, and field execution with weekly cost-to-complete and quality checkpoints through commissioning.
projects.outcome: Plant delivered on schedule and commissioned to USDA standards, with utilities, refrigeration, and process equipment coordinated to support full-rate production from startup.

projects.name: Silver Birch of Kokomo
projects.summary: A 119-unit assisted living community delivered on a wood-frame schedule with the finish consistency and clean closeout that senior living operators expect.
projects.challenges: Wood-frame speed without sacrificing quality, HUD process documentation cadence, and a finish-heavy interior on a fixed opening date.
projects.role: Owner-led design-build delivery from concept through closeout, including procurement of long-lead items and a punch and closeout cadence built around the opening date.
projects.outcome: Opened on schedule as a fully operational assisted living community, with a clean closeout package, warranties, and training logs handed over to the operator.

projects.name: Maple Leaf Foods
projects.summary: An addition to an operational pork processing plant priced at roughly $1,200 per square foot-built around live production without interrupting the line.
projects.challenges: Construction around an active, running plant; protecting food safety and sanitation during the work; and phasing access so production never stopped.
projects.role: Construction management and coordination around live operations-phasing, temporary partitions, off-hour work, and tight equipment and utility tie-ins.
projects.outcome: Capacity added with production continuity protected throughout, and food safety controls maintained during construction.

projects.name: Silver Birch of Terre Haute
projects.summary: A 119-unit assisted living community built on a wood-frame schedule, delivered through a winter build with quality and closeout discipline intact.
projects.challenges: Cold-weather construction sequencing, wood-frame speed targets, and HUD documentation cadence.
projects.role: Owner-led design-build delivery, procurement, and closeout coordination.
projects.outcome: Delivered on schedule and opened as a fully operational assisted living community.
